verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ صٓ ۚ وَٱلْقُرْءَانِ ذِى ٱلذِّكْرِ
verses.text: Ṣād. By the Qur’ān, containing the Reminder!

verses.quran_arabic: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فِى عِزَّةٍۢ وَشِقَاقٍۢ
verses.text: – No! Those who disbelieve are in false pride and defiance.

verses.quran_arabic: كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن قَرْنٍۢ فَنَادَوا۟ وَّلَاتَ حِينَ مَنَاصٍۢ
verses.text: How many a generation We have destroyed before them! They (all) called out, but there was no time for escape.

verses.quran_arabic: وَعَجِبُوٓا۟ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرٌۭ مِّنْهُمْ ۖ وَقَالَ ٱلْكَٰفِرُونَ هَٰذَا سَٰحِرٌۭ كَذَّابٌ
verses.text: Yet they are amazed that a warner has come to them from among them. The disbelievers say, ‘This (man) is a magician, a liar!

verses.quran_arabic: أَجَعَلَ ٱلْءَالِهَةَ إِلَٰهًۭا وَٰحِدًا ۖ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَشَىْءٌ عُجَابٌۭ
verses.text: Has he made the gods (into) one god? Surely this is an amazing thing indeed.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱنطَلَقَ ٱلْمَلَأُ مِنْهُمْ أَنِ ٱمْشُوا۟ وَٱصْبِرُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ ءَالِهَتِكُمْ ۖ إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَشَىْءٌۭ يُرَادُ
verses.text: The assembly of them set out (saying): ‘Walk (away), and remain steadfast to your gods. Surely this is a thing to be desired indeed.

verses.quran_arabic: مَا سَمِعْنَا بِهَٰذَا فِى ٱلْمِلَّةِ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ إِنْ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا ٱخْتِلَٰقٌ
verses.text: We have not heard of this in the last creed. This is only a fabrication.

verses.quran_arabic: أَءُنزِلَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلذِّكْرُ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا ۚ بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّۢ مِّن ذِكْرِى ۖ بَل لَّمَّا يَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِ
verses.text: Has the Reminder been sent down on him (alone) among us?’ No! They are in doubt about My Reminder! No! They have not yet tasted My punishment!

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَآئِنُ رَحْمَةِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْوَهَّابِ
verses.text: Or do they have the storehouses of the mercy of your Lord, the Mighty, the Giver?

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ لَهُم مُّلْكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ۖ فَلْيَرْتَقُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَسْبَٰبِ
verses.text: Or do they have the kingdom of the heavens and the earth, and whatever is between them? Let them ascend on the ropes.

verses.quran_arabic: جُندٌۭ مَّا هُنَالِكَ مَهْزُومٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلْأَحْزَابِ
verses.text: An army of the factions will be routed there.

verses.quran_arabic: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍۢ وَعَادٌۭ وَفِرْعَوْنُ ذُو ٱلْأَوْتَادِ
verses.text: Before them the people of Noah called (it) a lie, and ‘Ād, and Pharaoh, he of the stakes,

verses.quran_arabic: وَثَمُودُ وَقَوْمُ لُوطٍۢ وَأَصْحَٰبُ لْـَٔيْكَةِ ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ ٱلْأَحْزَابُ
verses.text: and Thamūd, and the people of Lot, and the people of the Grove – those were the factions.

verses.quran_arabic: إِن كُلٌّ إِلَّا كَذَّبَ ٱلرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ عِقَابِ
verses.text: Each of them called the messengers liars, and My retribution was justified.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا يَنظُرُ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ إِلَّا صَيْحَةًۭ وَٰحِدَةًۭ مَّا لَهَا مِن فَوَاقٍۢ
verses.text: What do these (people) expect but a single cry, for which (there will be) no delay.

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا عَجِّل لَّنَا قِطَّنَا قَبْلَ يَوْمِ ٱلْحِسَابِ
verses.text: They say, ‘Our Lord, hurry our share to us before the Day of Reckoning!’

verses.quran_arabic: ٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱذْكُرْ عَبْدَنَا دَاوُۥدَ ذَا ٱلْأَيْدِ ۖ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
verses.text: Bear with what they say, and remember Our servant David, (who was) endowed with strength. Surely he turned regularly (in repentance).

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّا سَخَّرْنَا ٱلْجِبَالَ مَعَهُۥ يُسَبِّحْنَ بِٱلْعَشِىِّ وَٱلْإِشْرَاقِ
verses.text: Surely We subjected the mountains (along) with him to glorify (Us) in the evening and at sunrise,

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلطَّيْرَ مَحْشُورَةًۭ ۖ كُلٌّۭ لَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌۭ
verses.text: and the birds (too), gathered together, all regularly turning to Him (in praise).

verses.quran_arabic: وَشَدَدْنَا مُلْكَهُۥ وَءَاتَيْنَٰهُ ٱلْحِكْمَةَ وَفَصْلَ ٱلْخِطَابِ
verses.text: We strengthened his kingdom, and gave him wisdom and a decisive word.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَهَلْ أَتَىٰكَ نَبَؤُا۟ ٱلْخَصْمِ إِذْ تَسَوَّرُوا۟ ٱلْمِحْرَابَ
verses.text: Has the story of the dispute come to you? When they climbed over the wall of the place of prayer,

verses.quran_arabic: إِذْ دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَىٰ دَاوُۥدَ فَفَزِعَ مِنْهُمْ ۖ قَالُوا۟ لَا تَخَفْ ۖ خَصْمَانِ بَغَىٰ بَعْضُنَا عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍۢ فَٱحْكُم بَيْنَنَا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلَا تُشْطِطْ وَٱهْدِنَآ إِلَىٰ سَوَآءِ ٱلصِّرَٰطِ
verses.text: when they entered upon David, and he was terrified of them, but they said, ‘Do not fear! (We are) two disputants: one of us has acted oppressively toward the other. So judge between us in truth, and do not be unjust, and guide us to the right path.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ هَٰذَآ أَخِى لَهُۥ تِسْعٌۭ وَتِسْعُونَ نَعْجَةًۭ وَلِىَ نَعْجَةٌۭ وَٰحِدَةٌۭ فَقَالَ أَكْفِلْنِيهَا وَعَزَّنِى فِى ٱلْخِطَابِ
verses.text: Surely this (man) is my brother. He has ninety-nine ewes, and I have (only) one ewe. He said, “Give her into my charge,” and he overcame me in the argument.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ لَقَدْ ظَلَمَكَ بِسُؤَالِ نَعْجَتِكَ إِلَىٰ نِعَاجِهِۦ ۖ وَإِنَّ كَثِيرًۭا مِّنَ ٱلْخُلَطَآءِ لَيَبْغِى بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَقَلِيلٌۭ مَّا هُمْ ۗ وَظَنَّ دَاوُۥدُ أَنَّمَا فَتَنَّٰهُ فَٱسْتَغْفَرَ رَبَّهُۥ وَخَرَّ رَاكِعًۭا وَأَنَابَ ۩
verses.text: He said, ‘Certainly he has done you evil in asking for your ewe (in addition) to his ewes. Surely many (business) partners indeed act oppressively toward one another, except those who believe and do righteous deeds – but few they are.’ And David guessed that We had (somehow) tested him, so he asked his Lord for forgiveness, and fell down, bowing, and turned (in repentance).

verses.quran_arabic: فَغَفَرْنَا لَهُۥ ذَٰلِكَ ۖ وَإِنَّ لَهُۥ عِندَنَا لَزُلْفَىٰ وَحُسْنَ مَـَٔابٍۢ
verses.text: So We forgave him that. Surely he has intimacy indeed with Us and a good (place of) return.

verses.quran_arabic: يَٰدَاوُۥدُ إِنَّا جَعَلْنَٰكَ خَلِيفَةًۭ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱحْكُم بَيْنَ ٱلنَّاسِ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلَا تَتَّبِعِ ٱلْهَوَىٰ فَيُضِلَّكَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَضِلُّونَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ لَهُمْ عَذَابٌۭ شَدِيدٌۢ بِمَا نَسُوا۟ يَوْمَ ٱلْحِسَابِ
verses.text: ‘David! Surely We have made you a ruler on the earth, so judge among the people in truth, and do not follow (vain) desire, or it will lead you astray from the way of God. Surely those who go astray from the way of God – for them (there is) a harsh punishment, because they have forgotten the Day of Reckoning.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا بَٰطِلًۭا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ظَنُّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ ۚ فَوَيْلٌۭ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.text: We did not create the sky and the earth, and whatever is between them, without purpose. That is the conjecture of those who disbelieve. So woe to those who disbelieve on account of the Fire!

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ نَجْعَلُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ كَٱلْمُفْسِدِينَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ أَمْ نَجْعَلُ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ كَٱلْفُجَّارِ
verses.text: Or shall We treat those who believe and do righteous deeds the same as the ones who foment corruption on the earth? Or shall We treat the ones who guard (themselves) the same as the depraved?

verses.quran_arabic: كِتَٰبٌ أَنزَلْنَٰهُ إِلَيْكَ مُبَٰرَكٌۭ لِّيَدَّبَّرُوٓا۟ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ وَلِيَتَذَكَّرَ أُو۟لُوا۟ ٱلْأَلْبَٰبِ
verses.text: A blessed Book – We have sent it down to you, so that those with understanding may contemplate its verses and take heed.

verses.quran_arabic: وَوَهَبْنَا لِدَاوُۥدَ سُلَيْمَٰنَ ۚ نِعْمَ ٱلْعَبْدُ ۖ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
verses.text: To David We granted Solomon – an excellent servant he was! Surely he turned regularly (in repentance).

verses.quran_arabic: إِذْ عُرِضَ عَلَيْهِ بِٱلْعَشِىِّ ٱلصَّٰفِنَٰتُ ٱلْجِيَادُ
verses.text: When the standing horses were presented before him in the evening,

verses.quran_arabic: فَقَالَ إِنِّىٓ أَحْبَبْتُ حُبَّ ٱلْخَيْرِ عَن ذِكْرِ رَبِّى حَتَّىٰ تَوَارَتْ بِٱلْحِجَابِ
verses.text: he said, ‘Surely I have loved the love of good (things) more than the remembrance of my Lord, until the sun has (now) been hidden by the veil.

verses.quran_arabic: رُدُّوهَا عَلَىَّ ۖ فَطَفِقَ مَسْحًۢا بِٱلسُّوقِ وَٱلْأَعْنَاقِ
verses.text: Return them to me!’ Then he began to stroke their legs and necks.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا سُلَيْمَٰنَ وَأَلْقَيْنَا عَلَىٰ كُرْسِيِّهِۦ جَسَدًۭا ثُمَّ أَنَابَ
verses.text: Certainly We tested Solomon, and placed on his throne a (mere) image. Then he turned (in repentance).

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَهَبْ لِى مُلْكًۭا لَّا يَنۢبَغِى لِأَحَدٍۢ مِّنۢ بَعْدِىٓ ۖ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْوَهَّابُ
verses.text: He said, ‘My Lord, forgive me, and grant me a kingdom (such as) will not be fitting for anyone after me (to have). Surely You – You are the Giver.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَسَخَّرْنَا لَهُ ٱلرِّيحَ تَجْرِى بِأَمْرِهِۦ رُخَآءً حَيْثُ أَصَابَ
verses.text: So We subjected the wind to him, to blow gently at his command wherever he decided,

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلشَّيَٰطِينَ كُلَّ بَنَّآءٍۢ وَغَوَّاصٍۢ
verses.text: and (also) the satans, every builder and diver,

verses.quran_arabic: وَءَاخَرِينَ مُقَرَّنِينَ فِى ٱلْأَصْفَادِ
verses.text: and others (as well) bound in chains:

verses.quran_arabic: هَٰذَا عَطَآؤُنَا فَٱمْنُنْ أَوْ أَمْسِكْ بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍۢ
verses.text: ‘This is Our gift, so bestow or withhold without reckoning.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنَّ لَهُۥ عِندَنَا لَزُلْفَىٰ وَحُسْنَ مَـَٔابٍۢ
verses.text: Surely he had intimacy indeed with Us, and a good (place of) return.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱذْكُرْ عَبْدَنَآ أَيُّوبَ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَسَّنِىَ ٱلشَّيْطَٰنُ بِنُصْبٍۢ وَعَذَابٍ
verses.text: And remember Our servant Job: When he called out to his Lord, ‘Surely I – Satan has touched me with weariness and punishment.’

verses.quran_arabic: ٱرْكُضْ بِرِجْلِكَ ۖ هَٰذَا مُغْتَسَلٌۢ بَارِدٌۭ وَشَرَابٌۭ
verses.text: ‘Stamp with your foot! This (will become) a cool (place for) washing and a drink.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُۥٓ أَهْلَهُۥ وَمِثْلَهُم مَّعَهُمْ رَحْمَةًۭ مِّنَّا وَذِكْرَىٰ لِأُو۟لِى ٱلْأَلْبَٰبِ
verses.text: And We granted him his household, and their equivalent with them, as a mercy from Us, and a reminder to those with understanding.

verses.quran_arabic: وَخُذْ بِيَدِكَ ضِغْثًۭا فَٱضْرِب بِّهِۦ وَلَا تَحْنَثْ ۗ إِنَّا وَجَدْنَٰهُ صَابِرًۭا ۚ نِّعْمَ ٱلْعَبْدُ ۖ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌۭ
verses.text: ‘And take in your hand a bunch, and strike with it, and do not break your oath.’ Surely We found him patient – an excellent servant he was! Surely he turned regularly (in repentance).

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱذْكُرْ عِبَٰدَنَآ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَإِسْحَٰقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ أُو۟لِى ٱلْأَيْدِى وَٱلْأَبْصَٰرِ
verses.text: And remember Our servants Abraham, and Isaac, and Jacob: endowed with strength and vision.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَٱذۡكُرۡ عَبۡدَنَا إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ وَإِسۡحَٰقَ وَيَعۡقُوبَ أُوْلِي ٱلۡأَيۡدِي وَٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرِ
canonical_variants.english: And recallsg Our servant Abraham and Isaac and Jacob—those endowed with strong faith and with sight(s).

canonical_variants.arabic: وَٱذۡكُرۡ عَبۡدَنَا إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ وَإِسۡحَٰقَ وَيَعۡقُوبَ أُوْلِي ٱلۡأَيۡدِي وَٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرِ
canonical_variants.english: And recallsg Our servant Abraham and Isaac and Jacob—those endowed with strong faith and with sight(s).

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّآ أَخْلَصْنَٰهُم بِخَالِصَةٍۢ ذِكْرَى ٱلدَّارِ
verses.text: Surely We purified them with a pure (thought): remembrance of the Home.

canonical_variants.english: Surely We distinguished them with the distinct quality of the remembrance of the )final( Home.
Surely We distinguished them with the distinct quality of the remembrance of the )final( Home.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنَّهُمْ عِندَنَا لَمِنَ ٱلْمُصْطَفَيْنَ ٱلْأَخْيَارِ
verses.text: Surely with Us they are indeed among the chosen, the good.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱذْكُرْ إِسْمَٰعِيلَ وَٱلْيَسَعَ وَذَا ٱلْكِفْلِ ۖ وَكُلٌّۭ مِّنَ ٱلْأَخْيَارِ
verses.text: And remember Our servants Ishmael, Elisha, and Dhū-l-Kifl: each (of them) was one of the good.

verses.quran_arabic: هَٰذَا ذِكْرٌۭ ۚ وَإِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ لَحُسْنَ مَـَٔابٍۢ
verses.text: This is a Reminder. Surely for the ones who guard (themselves) (there is) indeed a good (place of) return:

verses.quran_arabic: جَنَّٰتِ عَدْنٍۢ مُّفَتَّحَةًۭ لَّهُمُ ٱلْأَبْوَٰبُ
verses.text: Gardens of Eden, (where) the gates are open for them,

verses.quran_arabic: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا يَدْعُونَ فِيهَا بِفَٰكِهَةٍۢ كَثِيرَةٍۢ وَشَرَابٍۢ
verses.text: where they recline, (and) where they call for abundant fruit and drink.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَعِندَهُمْ قَٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرْفِ أَتْرَابٌ
verses.text: With them (are maidens) restraining (their) glances, (all) of the same age.

verses.quran_arabic: هَٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِيَوْمِ ٱلْحِسَابِ
verses.text: ‘This is what you were promised for the Day of Reckoning.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ هَٰذَا لَرِزْقُنَا مَا لَهُۥ مِن نَّفَادٍ
verses.text: Surely this is indeed Our provision – (there is) no end to it.

verses.quran_arabic: هَٰذَا ۚ وَإِنَّ لِلطَّٰغِينَ لَشَرَّ مَـَٔابٍۢ
verses.text: (All) this!’ But surely for the insolent transgressors (there is) indeed an evil (place of) return:

verses.quran_arabic: جَهَنَّمَ يَصْلَوْنَهَا فَبِئْسَ ٱلْمِهَادُ
verses.text: Gehenna, (where) they will burn – it is an evil bed!

verses.quran_arabic: هَٰذَا فَلْيَذُوقُوهُ حَمِيمٌۭ وَغَسَّاقٌۭ
verses.text: (All) this! So make them taste it – boiling (water) and rotten (food),

verses.quran_arabic: وَءَاخَرُ مِن شَكْلِهِۦٓ أَزْوَٰجٌ
verses.text: and other (torments) of (this) kind in pairs.

verses.quran_arabic: هَٰذَا فَوْجٌۭ مُّقْتَحِمٌۭ مَّعَكُمْ ۖ لَا مَرْحَبًۢا بِهِمْ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ صَالُوا۟ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.text: ‘This is a crowd rushing in with you – for them (there is) no welcoming. Surely they will burn in the Fire.’

canonical_variants.arabic: هَٰذَا فَوۡجٞ مُّقۡتَحِمٞ مَّعَكُمۡ لَا مَرۡحَبَۢا بِهِمۡ إِنَّهُمۡ صَالُواْ اُ۬لنّ۪ارِ
canonical_variants.english: And other (torments) similar to it, of diverse kinds.

canonical_variants.arabic: هَٰذَا فَوۡجٞ  مُّقۡتَحِمٞ مَّعَكُمۡ لَا مَرۡحَبَۢا بِهِمۡۚ إِنَّهُمۡ صَالُواْ اُ۬لنّ۪ارِ
canonical_variants.english: And other (torments) similar to it, of diverse kinds.

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ بَلْ أَنتُمْ لَا مَرْحَبًۢا بِكُمْ ۖ أَنتُمْ قَدَّمْتُمُوهُ لَنَا ۖ فَبِئْسَ ٱلْقَرَارُ
verses.text: They say, ‘No! It is you for whom (there is) no welcoming. You sent it forward for us, and it is an evil resting place!’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا مَن قَدَّمَ لَنَا هَٰذَا فَزِدْهُ عَذَابًۭا ضِعْفًۭا فِى ٱلنَّارِ
verses.text: They say, ‘Our Lord, whoever sent this forward for us, give him a double punishment in the Fire!’

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ مَا لَنَا لَا نَرَىٰ رِجَالًۭا كُنَّا نَعُدُّهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَشْرَارِ
verses.text: And they say, ‘What is (the matter) with us (that) we do not see men (here) whom we used to count among the evil?

verses.quran_arabic: أَتَّخَذْنَٰهُمْ سِخْرِيًّا أَمْ زَاغَتْ عَنْهُمُ ٱلْأَبْصَٰرُ
verses.text: Did we take them in ridicule? Or has (our) sight turned aside from them?’

canonical_variants.arabic: اِ۪تَّخَذۡنَٰهُمۡ سِخۡرِيًّاۖ أَمۡ زَاغَتۡ عَنۡهُمُ اُ۬لۡأَبۡصَٰرُ
canonical_variants.english: And they said, “What is it with us that we do not see men whom we used to count among the villains—

canonical_variants.arabic: اِ۪تَّخَذۡنَٰهُمۡ  سِخۡرِيًّا أَمۡ زَاغَتۡ عَنۡهُمُ اُ۬لۡأَبۡصَٰرُ
canonical_variants.english: And they said, “What is it with us that we do not see men whom we used to count among the villains—

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَحَقٌّۭ تَخَاصُمُ أَهْلِ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.text: Surely that is true indeed – the disputing of the companions of the Fire.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَحَقّٞ تَخَاصُمُ أَهۡلِ اِ۬لنّ۪ارِ
canonical_variants.english: whom we took with mockery, or have our sight(s) swerved from them?

canonical_variants.arabic: إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَحَقّٞ تَخَاصُمُ أَهۡلِ  اِ۬لنّ۪ارِ
canonical_variants.english: whom we took with mockery, or have our sight(s) swerved from them?

canonical_variants.arabic: إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَحَقّٞ تَخَاصُمُ أَهْلِ اِ۬لنَّارِۖ
canonical_variants.english: Did we abuse them, or have our sight(s) swerved from them?

canonical_variants.arabic: إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَحَقّٞ تَخَاصُمُ أَهْلِ اِ۬لنّ۪ارِۖ
canonical_variants.english: Did we abuse them, or have our sight(s) swerved from them?

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ مُنذِرٌۭ ۖ وَمَا مِنْ إِلَٰهٍ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ ٱلْوَٰحِدُ ٱلْقَهَّارُ
verses.text: Say: ‘I am only a warner. (There is) no god but God, the One, the Supreme,

verses.quran_arabic: رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْغَفَّٰرُ
verses.text: Lord of the heavens and the earth, and whatever is between them, the Mighty, the Forgiver.’

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ هُوَ نَبَؤٌا۟ عَظِيمٌ
verses.text: Say: ‘It is a great story

verses.quran_arabic: أَنتُمْ عَنْهُ مُعْرِضُونَ
verses.text: from which you turn away.

verses.quran_arabic: مَا كَانَ لِىَ مِنْ عِلْمٍۭ بِٱلْمَلَإِ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰٓ إِذْ يَخْتَصِمُونَ
verses.text: I had no knowledge of the exalted Assembly when they disputed.

verses.quran_arabic: إِن يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَىَّ إِلَّآ أَنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ نَذِيرٌۭ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: I am only inspired that I am a clear warner.’

verses.quran_arabic: إِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّى خَٰلِقٌۢ بَشَرًۭا مِّن طِينٍۢ
verses.text: (Remember) when your Lord said to the angels: ‘Surely I am going to create a human being from clay.

verses.quran_arabic: فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُۥ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِى فَقَعُوا۟ لَهُۥ سَٰجِدِينَ
verses.text: When I have fashioned him, and breathed some of My spirit into him, fall down before him in prostration.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَسَجَدَ ٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمْ أَجْمَعُونَ
verses.text: So the angels prostrated themselves – all of them together

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ ٱسْتَكْبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: – except Iblīs. He became arrogant, and was one of the disbelievers.

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ يَٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَن تَسْجُدَ لِمَا خَلَقْتُ بِيَدَىَّ ۖ أَسْتَكْبَرْتَ أَمْ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلْعَالِينَ
verses.text: He said, ‘Iblīs! What prevented you from prostrating yourself before what I created with My two hands? Have you become arrogant, or are you one of the exalted?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَيْرٌۭ مِّنْهُ ۖ خَلَقْتَنِى مِن نَّارٍۢ وَخَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن طِينٍۢ
verses.text: He said, ‘I am better than him. You created me from fire, but You created him from clay.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ فَٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمٌۭ
verses.text: He said, ‘Get out of here! Surely you are accursed!

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنَّ عَلَيْكَ لَعْنَتِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: surely My curse (is going to remain) on you until the Day of Judgment.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
verses.text: He said, ‘My Lord, spare me until the Day when they are raised up.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ فَإِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُنظَرِينَ
verses.text: He said, ‘Surely you are one of the spared

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْوَقْتِ ٱلْمَعْلُومِ
verses.text: – until the Day of the known time.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ فَبِعِزَّتِكَ لَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: He said, ‘Then, by Your honor, I shall indeed make them err – all (of them)

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنْهُمُ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ
verses.text: – except for Your devoted servants among them.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ فَٱلْحَقُّ وَٱلْحَقَّ أَقُولُ
verses.text: He said, ‘(This is) the truth, and the truth I say:

verses.quran_arabic: لَأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكَ وَمِمَّن تَبِعَكَ مِنْهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: I shall indeed fill Gehenna with you and those of them who follow you – all (of you)!’

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ قَالَ فَاَلۡحَقَّ وَاَلۡحَقَّ أَقُولُ لَأَمۡلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكَ وَمِمَّن تَبِعَكَ مِنۡهُمۡ أَجۡمَعِينَ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “So (by) the truth—and only the truth I say—

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ قَالَ فَاَلۡحَقَّ وَاَلۡحَقَّ أَقُول لَّأَمۡلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّم مِّنكَ وَمِمَّن تَبِعَكَ مِنۡهُمۡ  أَجۡمَعِينَ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “So (by) the truth—and only the truth I say—

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالَ فَٱلۡحَقَّ وَٱلۡحَقَّ أَقُولُ لَأَمۡلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكَ وَمِمَّن تَبِعَكَ مِنۡهُمُۥ أَجۡمَعِينَ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “So (by) the truth—and only the truth I say—

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالَ فَٱلۡحَقَّ وَٱلۡحَقَّ أَقُولُ لَأَمۡلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكَ وَمِمَّن تَبِعَكَ مِنۡهُمُۥ أَجۡمَعِينَ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “So (by) the truth—and only the truth I say—

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ قَالَ فَالْحَقَّ وَالْحَقَّ أَقُولُۖ لَأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكَ وَمِمَّن تَبِعَكَ مِنْهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “So (by) the truth—and only the truth I say—

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ قَالَ فَالْحَقَّ وَالْحَقَّ أَقُولُۖ لَأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكَ وَمِمَّن تَبِعَكَ مِنْهُمُۥٓ أَجْمَعِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: He said, “So (by) the truth—and only the truth I say—

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ مَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍۢ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلْمُتَكَلِّفِينَ
verses.text: Say: ‘I do not ask you for any reward for it, nor am I one of the pretenders.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌۭ لِّلْعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: It is nothing but a reminder to the worlds.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَتَعْلَمُنَّ نَبَأَهُۥ بَعْدَ حِينٍۭ
verses.text: You will indeed know its story after a time.’
